title: stelis viridiflava
intro: Stelis viridiflava, also known as the green-flowered stelis, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Stelis viridiflava include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and even help manage conditions such as arthritis and diabetes. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas and infusions, as well as being used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
